paper_record.title: Altermagnetism and Room-Temperature Metal-to-Insulator Transition in CsCr$_2$S$_2$O
paper_record.abstract: Metal-to-insulator transitions (MITs), particularly near room temperature, have been extensively studied in nonmagnetic and conventional ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic systems, yet the co-emergence of MIT and altermagnetism (AM) remains unexplored. Here, a layered chromium-based compound CsCr$_2$S$_2$O that realizes this coexistence was synthesized. It crystalizes in CeCr$_2$Si$_2$C-type structure with Cr moments orders in a C-type antiferromagnetic configuration below $T_\mathrm{N}$ = 326 K, constituting a room-temperature d-wave altermagnet. In the altermagnetic state, a subsequent Verwey-type MIT appears at $T_\mathrm{MI}$ = 305 K, driven by a tetragonal-to-orthorhombic structural distortion and stripe charge ordering of Cr$^{+2}$/Cr$^{+3}$ ions, while maintaining its altermagnetic character. First-principles calculations show moment-dependent spin-split electronic structures with maximum splitting energies of ~0.6 eV and ~0.3 eV in the metallic and insulating states, respectively. Our work links the two prominent phenomena, MIT and AM, in a single material, establishing a new platform for potential spintronic applications.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 在新型层状化合物 CsCr2S2O 中首次发现了室温附近的交错磁性与金属-绝缘体转变的共存。
one_sentence_summary.en: Discovery of the coexistence of altermagnetism and metal-to-insulator transition near room temperature in the new layered compound CsCr2S2O.

problem.zh: 探索交错磁性（AM）与金属-绝缘体转变（MIT）能否在单一材料中结合，并实现室温下的自旋极化调控。
problem.en: Exploring whether altermagnetism (AM) and metal-to-insulator transition (MIT) can coexist in a single material to enable spin-polarization control at room temperature.

approach.zh: 合成新型铬基化合物 CsCr2S2O，结合单晶/粉末 X 射线衍射、中子粉末衍射、电输运测量以及第一性原理计算进行系统研究。
approach.en: Synthesized a new Cr-based compound CsCr2S2O and investigated it using single-crystal/powder XRD, neutron powder diffraction, transport measurements, and DFT calculations.

main_takeaway.zh: CsCr2S2O 在 326 K 表现为 d 波交错磁体，并在 305 K 发生由电荷有序驱动的 Verwey 型金属-绝缘体转变，且在绝缘态下依然保持显著的自旋分裂特征。
main_takeaway.en: CsCr2S2O acts as a d-wave altermagnet below 326 K and undergoes a charge-order-driven Verwey-type MIT at 305 K, while maintaining significant spin-splitting features in the insulating state.

why_it_matters.zh: 该研究将关联电子物理与自旋电子学联系起来，为开发基于交错磁性的室温自旋电子器件（如自旋过滤器或开关）提供了理想平台。
why_it_matters.en: This work links correlated electron physics with spintronics, providing an ideal platform for developing altermagnetism-based room-temperature spintronic devices like spin filters or switches.

reason.zh: 首次在实验上展示了交错磁性与金属-绝缘体转变的共存，且转变温度位于室温附近，具有很强的应用前景。
reason.en: Experimentally demonstrates the coexistence of altermagnetism and MIT for the first time, with transition temperatures near room temperature, showing strong application potential.

reason.zh: 论文报道了新型磁性材料及其独特的相变行为，属于当前凝聚态物理极其关注的前沿领域。
reason.en: The paper reports a new magnetic material and its unique phase transition behavior, which is a highly focused frontier in condensed matter physics.
